summary: Phase 2 CRUD + seed + homepage integration verified end-to-end. All backend endpoints (categories, products, filters, POST/PATCH/DELETE, 404s, 409 duplicate) return expected shapes and status codes. Seed is idempotent across backend restart (15 categories, 9 products preserved). Homepage renders 15 category cards and exactly 6 best-seller cards from DB, null-price cards show 'Final price will be confirmed before pickup.', PATCH-then-reload live update to Hill Filter Coffee (₹77) reflected on UI (then reverted to ₹60). Add-to-cart toast fires. One minor UI polish issue found (toast description shows '[object Object]').
passed: GET /api/categories/coffee -> 200 with correct payload; unknown slug -> 404
GET /api/products -> 200, count=9, includes required fields and variants [{label,price}]
GET /api/products?best_seller=true -> exactly 6 (Hill Filter Coffee, Grilled Garden Sandwich, Chocolate Milkshake, Wild Hill Honey, Estate Chocolate Bar, Traveller's Dry Fruit Mix)
PATCH /api/products/{slug} price=999 -> 200 and GET reflects new value
Seed idempotency: backend restart kept counts at 15 categories, 9 products (no duplication)
Homepage / loads; data-testid='categories-section' shows 15 category cards from DB
data-testid='bestsellers-section' shows 6 product cards using data-testid='product-card-{slug}'
Live update: PATCH price to 77 then reload homepage -> Hill Filter Coffee card shows ₹77 (reverted to 60 after test)
Wild Hill Honey and Traveller's Dry Fruit Mix cards display 'Final price will be confirmed before pickup.' instead of a rupee price
Clicking data-testid='add-to-cart-hill-filter-coffee' triggers a sonner toast ('Hill Filter Coffee added')

failed.issue: Sonner toast description shows literal '[object Object]'. Suggests the toast is receiving a variant object where a string is expected. Card text: 'Hill Filter Coffee added ₹77 · [object Object]'.
failed.evidence: Runtime capture: 'Hill Filter Coffee added\n₹77 · [object Object]' from toast DOM after clicking add-to-cart on hill-filter-coffee.

failed.issue: Review request referenced data-testid='bestseller-card-{slug}' and 'add-to-cart-kolli-mountain-brew', but actual DOM uses data-testid='product-card-{slug}' and 'add-to-cart-{slug}'. Not a functional bug — just aligning documentation. All flows verified using actual testids.

action_items: Fix toast description in Add-to-Cart handler on BestSellers card so the variant label/price render as strings (currently emits [object Object]).
